productDisplayName: Nike Men Training Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition Navy blue shorts made of 96% polyester and 4% spandex, has 100% polyester grey panels on the sides with orange stripes on the panels made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex, pockets on the sides, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring and nike swoosh printed on the left leg Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash with like colours in cold water at 30 Degrees Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean Comfort and style go hand in hand when it comes to this pair of navy blue shorts from nike. The orange stripes running down both sides add that touch of vibrancy to the shorts. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft; for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Wear them for gymming, or jogging or to play a sport. A smart tee and a pair of well-fitting shoes are all you need to hit the road!
